costs_slippage.external_turnover_haircut_method: daily one-way turnover cost subtracted from next-day portfolio return; cost equals sum(abs(target_w - previous_w))*bps/10000

decision_rationale: Random-window costed validation did not trigger the AR-015 falsifier: 5 bps costed median Sharpe is 0.52258623 with 84.615385% positive windows and p25 Sharpe 0.11562103. Not accepted yet because turnover is material (median avg daily turnover 0.08285866; main annualized turnover proxy 21.00185571), qfa lacks native cost/slippage modeling, worst random costed Sharpe is -0.51612569, and orthogonality evidence is limited.

orthogonality_checks.method: Pearson correlation of overlapping daily equity returns from retained latest.json equity curves when available. Many artifacts lack equity curves.

qfa.data_source: Alpaca real market data via quant_for_agent.AlpacaGateway and qfa run_backtest; no CSV; --data-csv not used

random_period_protocol.method: 26 deterministic pseudo-random and stress two-year-ish windows over 2019-2025, each saved as a qfa temp-DB run using Alpaca-fetched real bars. External 5 bps turnover haircut applied to the same qfa signal stream.

suggested_child_ideas.divergent: ETF carry/term-structure defensive allocation using dividend/yield/curve proxies and monthly rebalancing, not price time-series momentum.
suggested_child_ideas.refinement: Monthly/weekly held 252-day ETF TSMOM variant with explicit no-trade bands to reduce turnover, then rerun the same Alpaca random-window 5-10 bps cost protocol.

warnings: qfa has no native cost/slippage argument; 1/5/10 bps costs are external postprocess haircuts on generated qfa weights.
AlpacaGateway in this repo does not expose adjusted-price parameter; bars are whatever Alpaca returns by default.
No daemon run and no trades placed.
ETF execution, bid/ask, taxes, borrow/short constraints, impact, and live fill timing not modeled.
